title: Oliver Winery taps Chicago beverage distributor for growth in 11 markets
description:
Beginning this summer, Reyes Beverage Group will distribute Oliver wines in Indiana, Florida, Texas, South Carolina, Colorado, Arizona, Maryland, Washington, D.C., Virginia, Oklahoma and Louisiana.

title: Conexus expanding council meetings to southern Indiana
description:
Conexus Indiana on Wednesday will host the first of two planned meetings of industry leaders in southern Indiana as the organization strives to expand access for its membership.

title: Indiana pauses autism therapy provider signups
description:
Indiana’s Family and Social Services Administration on Tuesday announced it will pause enrollment of new autism therapy providers for at least six months, beginning Saturday.

title: Cable manufacturer eyes $100M expansion at Indianapolis facility
description:
An Italian manufacturer of cables plans to invest $100 million to expand its Indianapolis operations, part of a push to bolster fabrication of one of its most used products.

title: Greg Hinz: The Bears wanted a deal. Springfield chose caution.
description:
It takes a big pony to pull a big wagon. That’s the main lesson to be learned from this weekend’s failure of the General Assembly to advance legislation to keep the Chicago Bears in Illinois.

title: Report: 80% of eligible children not served by state’s subsidized child care programs
